The Archives

Frames of a Legend

01 / 05
Nainital. Winter. The mountains couldn't outshine him.
02 / 05

03 / 05

05 / 05
The lake reflected everything except his ego — too vast to contain.

April  ·  2026

Here's to
You, Upkar.

May every candle you blow out light a new path forward.
